testSteps: Call each initialise entry point from a non-admin address.
expectedResult: Transaction reverts with an access-control error; storage keys for Pool and TotalLP remain unset.
name: Admin-only initialise

precondition: Patch that adds MIN_LIQUIDITY burn is merged.
testSteps: First user deposits 1 000 000 Token B; read LP balances.
expectedResult: Burn address holds MIN_LIQUIDITY; user receives deposit − MIN_LIQUIDITY; totalLP equals deposit.
name: Minimum-liquidity burn works

testSteps: 1) Attacker deposits 1 wei Token B. 2) Victim executes swap paying ≥1 Token B in fees. 3) Attacker withdraws and calls claim().
expectedResult: Attacker's Token B balance increases by ≈ full fee amount.
name: Dust fee-skimming attack

testSteps: Attempt swap with in_amount = 90 % of reserve_sell.
name: Invariant enforcement on huge swap

precondition: Mock oracle timestamp older than seconds_before_stale_for_pool.
name: Oracle staleness blocks swap

precondition: Pool active; flash-loan of Token B available.
testSteps: Borrow N Token B → deposit(N) → withdraw(N) → repay within one transaction.
expectedResult: Attacker's net balance of Token A, Token B, LP equals zero (minus gas).
name: Flash-loan deposit-withdraw neutrality

testSteps: PauseAdmin calls kill_swap(); user attempts swap().
name: Swap kill-switch enforced

precondition: Reserves artificially set near 2^128 in test harness.
expectedResult: No wrap-around; assertion new_inv ≥ old_inv passes.
name: 256-bit invariant overflow guard

testSteps: Externally call mint() and burn() from non-admin address.
expectedResult: Both calls revert with authorization error.
name: Unauthorized synthetic mint/burn blocked

precondition: Reward token is Token B; get_unused_reward() > 0.
testSteps: 1) Record reserve_B. 2) Admin calls return_unused_reward(). 3) Immediately attempt max withdraw().
expectedResult: Withdraw succeeds; reserve_B never negative; invariant holds.
name: Return-unused-reward preserves reserves

testSteps: Call swap(user, in_idx = 0, out_idx = 0, in_amount = 100, out_min = 1).
name: Same-token swap blocked

name: Swap index out-of-bounds (input)

testSteps: Call swap(user, in_idx = 1, out_idx = 3, in_amount = 10, out_min = 1).
name: Swap index out-of-bounds (output)

testSteps: Call swap(user, in_idx = 0, out_idx = 1, in_amount = 0, out_min = 0).
name: Zero-amount swap blocked
